rationale: Physics L4 decomposes each L3 community into named research themes, target systems, or experimental techniques. Topological matter splits TI/Weyl/topo-supercon/higher-order; correlated electrons by model + system; HEP by experiment/theory subarea + dark sector; quantum information by gate + hardware-specific challenges. Astrophysics gets exoplanet methodology + stellar evolution + galactic AGN + transient classes; cosmology CMB + LSS + dark energy + early universe. Black hole physics splits ringdown / shadow / accretion. Soft + biological physics get distinct working communities.

leaves.tagline: Topological insulators, surface states, Z2 topology, ARPES studies.

uncovered_concerns: Applied & Instrumentation Physics L2 has no L4 here — papers fold under closest experimental L4 (detector physics under HEP detectors; precision physics under AMO clocks).
